name: Easy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 5 x 9-inch loaf pan with some of the margarine.
2. In a heatproof mixing bowl or double boiler, combine the remaining margarine, sugar, cocoa, vanilla extract, and soy milk.
3. Place the bowl or boiler over simmering water and stir until smooth. Add the nuts if desired.
4. Pour the mixture quickly into the prepared pan.
5. Chill thoroughly and cut into squares.
Makes 2 to 3 dozen squares
Preparation Time: 15 minutes Chilling Time:
1 hour
